appwrite's docs dataset is present and it contains everything. Always check into appwrite's docs dataset of how to implement a feature instead of blindly following old data from your memory. This is a dotnet project, appwrite does have a dotnet sdk. Follow their dotnet guide.
This is a dotnet project, appwrite does have a dotnet sdk. Follow their dotnet guide.
Appwrite's Databases method is depriciated, and now its being named to tablesDb. follow the tables db naming convention instead of the old databases naming convention.
